plugins.name: ask-framework
plugins.description: ASK (Agent Security Framework) compliance reviewer, architecture designer, and threat analyst — ASK 2026.03. Three skills: ask-review (25-tenet compliance audit, cognitive model verification, trust spectrum assessment), ask-design (enforcement layer architecture, configuration generation for Mind/Gateway/Egress/Enforcer/Delegation/Audit), and ask-threats (threat model analysis, XPIA kill chain posture, attack surface assessment across traditional/novel/hybrid threat categories).

plugins.name: ax-optimizer
plugins.description: AX Optimization reviewer for CLIs, MCP servers, and agent-facing tool surfaces. Produces maturity scores, implementation findings, refactor roadmaps, and trajectory test plans for Agent Experience.

plugins.name: defined-mcp
plugins.description: Defined Networking / Managed Nebula MCP integration for coding and DevOps agents. Provides agent-accessible tools for networks, hosts, enrollment codes, roles, firewall rules, tags, routes, audit logs, downloads, and host diagnostics.

plugins.name: limacharlie-mcp
plugins.description: Standalone LimaCharlie MCP suite with Vault-first auth, focused profiles, bounded review tools, and incident workflow skills for detect, contain, evict, and recover workflows.
